title: Infosys and Madison Square Garden Family of Companies Extend Digital Innovation Partnership
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an extension and expansion of its multi-year digital innovation partnership with the Madison Square Garden Family of Companies. Infosys remains Official Digital Innovation Partner across key MSG properties, including the New York Knicks, New York Rangers, Madison Square Garden and MSG Networks, and the Theater at Madison Square Garden has been renamed the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden. No financial terms were disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys, Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp., Madison Square Garden Sports Corp. and Sphere Entertainment Co. announced an extension of their partnership.
Infosys remains the Official Digital Innovation Partner across key MSG Family of Companies properties, including the New York Knicks, New York Rangers, Madison Square Garden and MSG Networks.
The Theater at Madison Square Garden has been renamed the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden.

partnerships_or_deals.counterparty: Madison Square Garden Family of Companies
partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys extended and expanded its multi-year digital innovation partnership with the Madison Square Garden Family of Companies, including entitlement naming of the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden and continued fan-engagement initiatives for the New York Knicks and New York Rangers.

important_text_spans.text: today announced an extension of their partnership.
the Theater at Madison Square Garden has been renamed the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden.

processing_notes: Classified as not material because the announcement is mainly a brand, sponsorship and fan-engagement partnership with no disclosed financial value or material operating impact.
